# Textbook Library — AI Readable Index

## Project Info
- Name: China K-12 Textbook Library (中国K12中小学教材库)
- Version: 1.0.0
- Total Textbooks: 2637
- Source: basic.smartedu.cn/tchMaterial (National Smart Education Platform of China)
- License: MIT (code) / Platform copyright (data)
- Mission: Open public-benefit, helping global Chinese learners

## Quick Start for AI Agents
- Read catalog index: references/catalog_index.md
- Structured data: references/catalog.json
- CSV format: references/catalog.csv
- Lookup script: scripts/lookup.js (Node) or scripts/lookup.py (Python)
- Stage-specific indexes: references/primary.md, junior.md, senior.md, special.md

## Catalog Dimensions
1. Stage (学段): 小学, 初中, 高中, 特殊教育, 小学(五四学制), 初中(五四学制), 其他
2. Subject (学科): 语文, 数学, 英语, 物理, 化学, 生物, 历史, 地理, 道德与法治, etc.
3. Edition (版本): 人教版, 北师大版, 苏教版, 部编版, etc.
4. Grade (年级): 一年级 through 十二年级
5. Volume (册次): 上册, 下册, 全一册

## Entry Points
- SKILL.md: Claude Code skill definition
- AGENTS.md: Universal AI agent instructions
- README.md: Human-friendly project overview (bilingual)
- CONTRIBUTING.md: How to contribute

## Integration
- OpenClaw: Auto-detected via skills/ directory, 50+ messaging platforms
- Hermes Agent: Auto-loaded via skills/ directory, self-improving skill system
- Claude Code: Auto-detected via .claude/skills/textbook-library/
- ChatGPT/GPT: Use AGENTS.md as instructions, catalog.csv as knowledge
- Codex CLI (OpenAI): Auto-indexed via AGENTS.md in skills directory
- Cursor/Windsurf: Auto-indexed via AGENTS.md
- GitHub Copilot / Cline / RooCode: Auto-indexed via AGENTS.md
- Aider / Gemini CLI: Run lookup scripts directly
- Devin: Fork project, auto-indexed
- LangChain: Parse catalog.json directly
- Continue.dev / OpenHands: Project-level skills indexing
- Custom: Run lookup.js or lookup.py via subprocess
